name: canshare-tnm-haematology-non-mf-or-ss-cn
title: NZ AJCC haematology primary cutaneous B cell or T cell (non MF/SS) lymphoma clinical N category
description: A clinical regional lymph node stage (cN) of a cutaneous B cell or T cell lymphoma (non Mycosis fungoides and non-sezary syndrome) before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
